title: Rename device - close/open the General tab
scenario: Device name change does not persist after closing and reopening the General tab in Device Settings
steps: 1. Launch the Poly Studio Mobile app with the Bluetooth audio device connected.
2. Navigate to Home → [Device Name] → Device Settings → General.
3. Tap on the device's official name field.
4. Enter a new name for the device.
5. Tap Done to save the new name.
6. Close the General tab (e.g., tap Back or navigate away).
7. Reopen the General tab by navigating to Home → [Device Name] → Device Settings → General.
8. Observe the device name displayed in the name field.
expected: The new device name entered in step 4 is still displayed in the name field after reopening the General tab.
